seeds.value: Define current quarter/year business objectives. Example: Q1 targets: grow MRR 20%, 95% uptime, 50 NPS, ship 3 major features.
seeds.description: Business objectives and KPI targets for the current period

seeds.value: Weekly executive summary every Monday. Ad-hoc reports on request.
seeds.description: How often and when executive summaries should be generated

seeds.value: Define your key performance indicators. Example: MRR, churn rate, deployment frequency, mean time to recovery, NPS, support ticket resolution time.
seeds.description: Which KPIs to track and report on
